name: track-seed-add-follows
note: S-ADD-STABLE (operator spec 2026-07-17, verbatim: 'the list should not be reordered. it should not scroll....just set item selected'). Tapping + on a keyed seq-less TRACK row ('Hendrix Style Jam in A Minor'): (a) the visible LIST ORDER is IDENTICAL before and after, (b) the SCROLL POSITION does not move, (c) the tapped row shows the checked state, in place. No relocation, no snap, no follow - stability IS the contract. Written red-first against the scroll-follow band-aid this replaces.

steps.label: bring the target row into view FIRST (the user is looking at it), then snapshot the pre-tap world: full row-title order + scroll position
steps.js: (function(){var rows=Array.prototype.slice.call(document.querySelectorAll('#songsList .listItem'));var r=rows.filter(function(x){return x.textContent.indexOf('Hendrix Style Jam')>=0;})[0];if(!r)return false;r.scrollIntoView({block:'center'});var sc=document.getElementById('libSongs');window.__preOrder=Array.prototype.map.call(document.querySelectorAll('#songsList .listItem .li-title'),function(t){return t.textContent.trim();});window.__preScroll=sc?sc.scrollTop:0;return window.__preOrder.length>10 && window.__preScroll>0;})()

steps.label: the LIST ORDER is byte-identical after the add - no row moved anywhere (operator: 'the list should not be reordered')
the SCROLL POSITION did not move (operator: 'it should not scroll')
the tapped row is CHECKED, in place (operator: 'just set item selected')
and the setlist gained exactly one entry
